examples: Snuggle as you watch a romantic flick together.
Most nights he will crawl up and sleep on my shoulder and snuggle into my neck.
Snuggle together while watching romantic movies (Casablanca, Audrey Hepburn are my favorite).
Are you considering housing and home-furnishing sizing that suits new snuggle-up housing in older residential communities?
Snuggle up in the distinctly New England ambience of a double, full, queen, or king room.
